rulesStrings.li: ntkmeme_scene->The image [depicts] [Quantity_adjphrase] Mirira pulling on a retiring Qiluo. The Mirira look desperate and reluctant to let go. At the bottom are two lines: "What will we eat without you?" "Yeah, what?" [style_clause].

ntkmeme_scene->This work [depicts] a surgical accident. On the operating table lies [ntkmeme_surgery_victim], [side_position] is a dragonian doctor saying: "I didn't kill you, the rimworld killed you!"

ntkmeme_scene->The work [depicts] a doctor crying beside a [ntkmeme_race] corpse.[side_position] is a [PersonJob] [desc_pawn], comforting: "A healer's skill grows with every patient treated. In other words, the more patients you kill, the more skilled you become."
ntkmeme_scene->The image [depicts] a pair of smiling tigers and two black-horned sharks. [style_clause], [symbolizes] something [AdjectiveFriendly] about New Three Kingdoms.

ntkmeme_scene->The story takes place at [ntkmeme_place] in [ntkmeme_location]. A [pawn_adj] [ntkmeme_race] is giving a speech to [Quantity_adjphrase] soldiers: "All forces, hear me! Fight to the last moment, then return to heaven by your own blade!"
ntkmeme_scene->The entire image [depicts] a [emotional_expression] dragonian, [idles] at [ntkmeme_location]. [style_clause], with the caption: "Dragon, is a symbol of king!"

ntkmeme_scene->The scene [depicts] a [ConceptBadass] [Enemy] at [ntkmeme_place] in [ntkmeme_location], turning to say: "Wait here, watch me stab [ntkmeme_specialCharacter] ten thousand see-through holes!"
ntkmeme_surgery_victim->a [ntkmeme_race] whose [ntkmeme_organ] was taken out and put back halfway
ntkmeme_surgery_victim->a [ntkmeme_race] with head separated from body
